sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed with SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        print(f"Sky blue: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Compare with previous frame
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
    prev_squares = [(n['boundary'], n['pixels']) for n in prev_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
    curr_squares = [(n['boundary'], n['pixels']) for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
    print(f"Prev squares: {prev_squares}")
    print(f"Curr squares: {curr_squares}")

# Check all nodes for changes
print("\nAll nodes by color:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, top-left={n['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find what changed between frames
prev_ascii = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')
curr_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

changed_cells = []
for r in range(len(prev_ascii)):
    for c in range(len(prev_ascii[r])):
        if r < len(curr_ascii) and c < len(curr_ascii[r]):
            if prev_ascii[r][c] != curr_ascii[r][c]:
                changed_cells.append((r, c, prev_ascii[r][c], curr_ascii[r][c]))

print(f"Changed cells: {changed_cells}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Cols 44-48: SSSSS (right square)
